message:
feat: Implement real file I/O and fix API delegation

- cpython_api.zig: Delegate Py_GenericAlias to full impl in genericaliasobject.zig
- cpython_api.zig: Delegate PyDictProxy_New to full impl in descrobject.zig
- fileio.zig: Implement fileio_read with POSIX read and size parsing
- fileio.zig: Implement fileio_readall with chunked reading
- fileio.zig: Implement fileio_readinto for bytearray buffers
- fileio.zig: Implement fileio_write with bytes/bytearray support
- fileobject.zig: Implement PyFile_WriteString with method lookup and fd write
